result.L18_reversibility: CONFIRM: HDC remove-gap=0.00 (exact, commutative) vs RWKV delta remove-gap=0.116 (path-dependent)
result.L1_capacity_race: INCONCLUSIVE: rank-1-among-N too lenient; cosine-fidelity favors continuous + is D-independent for sign-bundle (HDC fid=0 is sign-tie artifact NOT territory). delta vs hebbian ~tied on fidelity.
result.real_elephant: capacity<->editability TRADEOFF: delta-rule buys capacity(prop d) at cost of commutative-editability; HDC plain-sum buys exact editability at cost of capacity. opposite ends = complementary tiers.

note: Corrects prior CONFIRM which overweighted L1. L18 reversibility is the clean robust win (definitional: HDC bundle remove=subtraction of commutative sum=exact; RWKV delta state is path-entangled). L1 delta>>hebbian per-byte NOT demonstrated (metric-confounded) -> INCONCLUSIVE, needs MQAR-style retrieval benchmark.
